title: BBAI Stock Forecast 2026 - BigBear.ai Price Targets & Predictions
text: BBAI stock price forecast and predictions for 2026-2027. TickerNerd aggregates analyst targets and provides price predictions based on technical and fundamental analysis. The consensus long-term target around $5.50 suggests 30%+ upside from recent trading levels, but near-term volatility remains likely as the company executes its transformation strategy.
